title: Opening for Software Engineer at Dunzo

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Dunzo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Software Engineer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
